summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All new features verified: 1) Sub-categories for suppliers/expenses (Category model with parent_id), 2) Document file attachments (upload/download actual files), 3) Employee payslip PDF generation with signature/stamp areas, 4) Company logo upload. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with test@example.com/password123 returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/categories with parent_id creates sub-category
Backend: GET /api/categories returns categories with parent_id field
Backend: POST /api/suppliers with sub_category field works
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns sub_category field
Backend: POST /api/expenses with sub_category field works
Backend: POST /api/documents/{id}/upload uploads file successfully
Backend: GET /api/documents/{id}/download downloads attached file
Backend: GET /api/salary-payments/{id}/payslip returns valid PDF
Backend: Payslip PDF has signature/stamp areas (content size >1000 bytes)
Backend: POST /api/settings/upload-logo works
Frontend: Suppliers page has Category dropdown - VERIFIED
Frontend: Suppliers page has Sub-Category dropdown (appears when category selected) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Suppliers page has Add Sub-Category input with + Add button - VERIFIED
Frontend: Expenses page has Sub-Category dropdown - VERIFIED
Frontend: Documents page has File column with download/attach buttons - VERIFIED
Frontend: Documents show 'test_doc.txt' and 'test_upload.txt' attachments - VERIFIED
Frontend: Documents show 'Attach' link for docs without files - VERIFIED
Frontend: Employee page payment summary has payslip download icon (FileText) on each payment - VERIFIED (8 buttons found)
Frontend: Employee Portal has 'My Payments' table with Payslip PDF column - VERIFIED
Frontend: Employee Portal shows PDF download buttons for each payment row - VERIFIED (8 buttons found)
critical_code_review_comments: Category model correctly has parent_id field for sub-category hierarchy
Supplier and Expense models correctly have sub_category field
Document model has file_path and file_name fields for file attachments
File upload endpoint correctly stores files in /app/backend/uploads/documents/
Payslip PDF generation includes: employee details, payment breakdown, monthly salary, net payment, salary balance, employee signature line, authorized by line, and company stamp area
Employee Portal correctly shows payslip download button (PDF) for each payment in the payments table
seed_data_creation: Test data: 'TEST_Document_For_Upload' created, 'test_upload.txt' file attached. Sub-categories 'TEST_Steel', 'TEST_Printer Ink' created. Test expense with sub_category created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 complete. New features tested: 1) Category model has parent_id for sub-categories - POST /api/categories with parent_id creates sub-category, 2) Supplier model has sub_category field - works in create/update, 3) Expense model has sub_category field, 4) Document model has file_path/file_name - POST /api/documents/{id}/upload and GET /api/documents/{id}/download work correctly, 5) GET /api/salary-payments/{id}/payslip generates PDF with employee details, payment breakdown, signature lines, and company stamp area, 6) POST /api/settings/upload-logo uploads company logo. Frontend: Suppliers page shows Sub-Category dropdown + Add input when category selected. Expenses page shows Sub-Category dropdown. Documents page shows File column with download/attach buttons. Employees page summary dialog has payslip (FileText) icon on each payment. Employee Portal has Payslip PDF column in My Payments table.
